mapper.sql: id, user_id, note_id, author_id, published_at, source_type, item_status, delivered_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bluenote_feed.feed_inbox_item ( id, user_id, note_id, author_id, published_at, source_type, item_status, delivered_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{noteId}, #{authorId}, #{publishedAt}, #{sourceType}, #{itemStatus}, #{deliveredAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE author_id = VALUES(author_id), published_at = VALUES(published_at), source_type = VALUES(source_type), item_status = VALUES(item_status), delivered_at = VALUES(delivered_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
